context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the respond-to-review instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when you receive code review feedback on an Elixir/Phoenix PR and need to determine what to implement, what to push back on, and how to iterate.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Classify before implementing.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Reviewer says: "String.to_atom/1 should be used for this enum field."

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix test` — full suite must pass

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix format --check-formatted`

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `mix credo --strict`
